ogTitle: Farrants Hill vs Fassifern: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Farrants Hill and Fassifern.
heading: Farrants Hill vs Fassifern — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Farrants Hill, New South Wales and Fassifern, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fassifern has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Farrants Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Farrants Hill or Fassifern safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Farrants Hill has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Fassifern scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Farrants Hill scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Fassifern scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Farrants Hill or Fassifern?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fassifern has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
